description: OpenHands skill-creator workflow.research step 0 app prompt JSON output.

assert.value: const trimmed = output.trim(); if (!trimmed.startsWith('{') || !trimmed.endsWith('}')) return false; const data = JSON.parse(trimmed); data.status === 'research_complete' && Number.isInteger(data.dimensions_selected) && data.dimensions_selected >= 0 && Number.isInteger(data.question_count) && data.research_output && data.research_output.version === '1' && data.research_output.metadata && Array.isArray(data.research_output.metadata.priority_questions) && data.research_output.metadata.research_plan && Array.isArray(data.research_output.sections) && Array.isArray(data.research_output.answer_evaluator_notes)
